text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The first space, with its clean lines and emptiness, carries a quiet, waiting energy, as if on the cusp of purposeful activity. Entering the vibrant R+D exhibition area fills me with excitement and intellectual stimulation – here, bold graphics and displays about innovation and human-machine relations provoke contemplation and wonder. Together, both scenes invite me to reflect on the nature of progress and my own place within a world of evolving ideas.
